MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-22-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-22-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Anthony Vaughn.
Phil Kilduff, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
No appearance by the Defendant: Jim E. Blacksten.
Trial brief and declaration of Janet Tucker rec'd and filed in court.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Jim E. Blacksten as follows:
Principal $6,490.86
Interest $460.57
Attorneys' fees $975.00
Costs $198.30 for a total of $8,124.73
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2004 Set For Trial On Feb-22-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
